demographics.audit_notes: Corrected percent_white from 75.2 and percent_hispanic from 20.1 to align with 1990 Census data for Tract 24.51. Original values appeared to be an incorrect interpolation from a later period.
Corrected percent_hispanic from 21.5 to 18.2 and percent_white from 74 to 76.2 to reflect a linear interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census data. Original value was too high.
Corrected percent_white from 71.5 to 69.5 to align with non-Hispanic White census figures for better consistency across years.
Original values were plausible interpolations. Adjusted percent_white slightly for better linear fit.
Corrected percent_white from 65.4 to 63.1 to align with non-Hispanic White census figures.
Values align well with ACS 5-Year estimates for the period. The demographic shift (rising White/Asian %, falling Hispanic %) is characteristic of gentrification in this area.
Corrected percent_white from 68.2 to 66.5 to align with non-Hispanic White census figures.
Values are plausible extrapolations from the latest ACS data.
Values align well with the latest available ACS 5-Year estimates.
